item.title: Aotearoa New Zealand
item.description: Fehi Fineanganofo broke a Super Rugby record and Josh Moorby matched it as the Hurricanes overwhelmed the Chiefs 60-5 in a grand final demolition in Wellington.
item.content:encoded: Fehi Fineanganofo broke a Super Rugby record and Josh Moorby matched it as the Hurricanes overwhelmed the Chiefs 60-5 in a grand final demolition in Wellington.

item.title: Cook Islands set up Papua New Guinea showdown after historic Tonga win The hosts are one win away from qualification after a commanding 4-0 victory over Tonga at the 2026 OFC U19 Men's Championship in Rarotonga.
item.description: The hosts are one win away from qualification after a commanding 4-0 victory over Tonga at the 2026 OFC U19 Men's Championship in Rarotonga.

item.title: Tonga Election Scandal: third cabinet minister found guilty of bribery The government is under pressure as Dr Taniela Fusimalohi is convicted of election bribery amid possible byelections and a wider cabinet shakeup.
item.description: The government is under pressure as Dr Taniela Fusimalohi is convicted of election bribery amid possible byelections and a wider cabinet shakeup.

item.title: Hat-trick hero Tita puts PNG one win from OFC U19 championship David Tita stars with three goals and an assist as Papua New Guinea move closer to qualification with a commanding win over Tonga in Rarotonga.
item.description: David Tita stars with three goals and an assist as Papua New Guinea move closer to qualification with a commanding win over Tonga in Rarotonga.

item.title: Moana Pasifika rescue must be more than a bailout, says academic Professor Steven Ratuva says New Zealand should treat saving the club as a long-term Pacific partnership, not just another rugby funding project.
item.description: Professor Steven Ratuva says New Zealand should treat saving the club as a long-term Pacific partnership, not just another rugby funding project.

item.title: Cook Islands
item.description: A Pacific screen producer says the arrival of HBO Max in Aotearoa and the wider Pacific is more about whether local creators can tell their own stories.
item.content:encoded: A Pacific screen producer says the arrival of HBO Max in Aotearoa and the wider Pacific is more about whether local creators can tell their own stories.
